name: Kandji Active Accounts Without Employee Record
description: Detects active Kandji accounts whose email does not match any employee record.
query: SELECT u.user_id AS id, u.email AS email FROM kandji_users u LEFT JOIN employees e ON LOWER(COALESCE(u.email, '')) = LOWER(e.work_email) WHERE COALESCE(u.is_active, true) = true AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.email), '') != '' AND e.work_email IS NULL
remediation: Review unmatched accounts, classify approved non-employee identities, and disable unknown access.
